pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to AI Test and Evaluation Specialist scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("model validat", "conceptual soundness", "outcome.{0,10}analys"). STRM composite is moderate (0.4061); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.
